-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22sort%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc encontrarSoma(vetor %5B%5Dint, alvo, indice, somaAtual int) bool%7B%0A    if somaAtual == alvo %7B%0A        return true%0A    %7D%0A%0A    if somaAtual%3E alvo %7C%7C indice %3E= len(vetor)%7B%0A        return false%0A    %7D%0A    if encontrarSoma(vetor,alvo, indice+1, somaAtual+vetor%5Bindice%5D)%7B%0A        return true%0A    %7D%0A    if encontrarSoma(vetor, alvo, indice +1, somaAtual) %7B%0A        return true%0A    %7D%0A    return false%0A%0A%7D%0A%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A   reader := bufio.NewReader(os.Stdin)%0A%0A%09var n, k int%0A%09// L%C3%AA n (quantidade de elementos) e k (soma alvo)%0A%09fmt.Fscan(reader, &n, &k)%0A%0A%09nums := make(%5B%5Dint, n)%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C n; i++ %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Fscan(reader, &nums%5Bi%5D)%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09// Otimiza%C3%A7%C3%A3o: Ordenar os n%C3%BAmeros permite fazer podas eficientes%0A%09sort.Ints(nums)%0A%0A%09if encontrarSoma(nums, k, 0, 0) %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22true%22)%0A%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22false%22)%0A%09%7D
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22)
